events.text: Wrote the compliance assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Based on the described evidence — clearances, labels, supports, and terminations in place per the referenced detail, and no open correction note on the inspection card — the work **passes** as rough-complete, with low risk and no flagged component conditions.
